allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "node|tsx|vite|prisma"} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 3000 -and $_.LocalPort -le 9000 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Id 44792 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "Process: $\($proc.ProcessName\)"; Write-Host "Started: $\($proc.StartTime\)"; Write-Host "Path: $\($proc.Path\)" } else { Write-Host "Process 44792 nao existe mais" })

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:fiYFCOxiuwVTypUaOShAxROxLPXuicOO@gondola.proxy.rlwy.net:57584/railway'; cd servicos-global\\servicos-plataforma; "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND \(table_name ILIKE '%historico%' OR table_name ILIKE '%alerta%' OR table_name ILIKE '%notificacoes%'\);" | npx prisma db execute --schema=.\\generated\\schema.prisma --stdin 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8005,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" } catch { "could not kill $\($_.OwningProcess\): $_" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "--- portas após kill ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8005,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8000,8001,8005 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table)

PowerShell($ports = @\(8005, 3001\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) on port $p" } catch { Write-Output "fail PID $\($c.OwningProcess\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "--- check ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8005,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess)
